title: Property Consultant - Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India - Growth Opportunity
company: Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India!
